overview.description: The FT Vest U.S. Equity Max Buffer ETF - April (APXM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund seeks to provide a pre-determined investment outcome over a one year period. The exposure is reset annually in April APXM was launched on Apr 17, 2025 and is issued by First Trust.
